name: Accounts Receivable Processor
description: Handles customer billing, payment processing, and collection activities.

name: Accounts Payable Processor
description: Processes vendor invoices, manages payment runs, and maintains vendor records.

name: General Ledger Accountant
description: Performs journal entries, period-end closing, and financial reporting.

name: Financial Controller
description: Oversees financial statements, GL master data, and reporting integrity.

name: Cost Center Analyst
description: Manages cost center accounting, internal orders, and cost allocation.

name: Treasury Analyst
description: Manages cash positions, bank statements, and check processing.

name: Procurement Buyer
description: Creates purchase orders, manages requisitions, and handles vendor sourcing.

name: Strategic Procurement Manager
description: Manages contracts, vendor relationships, and sourcing strategy.

name: Warehouse Clerk
description: Processes goods receipts, issues, and basic inventory transactions.

name: Inventory Manager
description: Manages warehouse operations, physical inventory, and storage optimization.

name: Maintenance Planner
description: Plans and schedules preventive and corrective maintenance work orders.

name: Maintenance Technician

name: Maintenance Supervisor
description: Oversees maintenance operations, approves work orders, manages equipment.

name: Quality Inspector
description: Performs quality inspections, records results, and makes usage decisions.

name: Quality Manager
description: Manages quality planning, notifications, and certification processes.

name: HR Administrator
description: Maintains employee master data and manages organizational structures.

name: Payroll Processor
description: Executes payroll runs, manages time evaluation, and handles payroll queries.

name: Sales Order Processor
description: Creates sales orders, manages deliveries, and handles billing.

name: IT Basis Administrator
description: Manages system users, roles, transports, and system monitoring.

name: Vendor Management Specialist
description: Creates and maintains vendor master records across all procurement domains.

name: Credit Management Analyst
description: Manages customer credit limits and collection strategies.

name: Supply Chain Coordinator
description: Coordinates demand planning, logistics, and distribution activities.

name: Production Planner

name: Engineering Specialist
description: Manages engineering changes, document records, and technical specs.

name: AP Senior Specialist
description: Handles complex AP transactions including GR/IR clearing and payment approvals.

name: AR Senior Specialist
description: Manages complex AR transactions including credit decisions and dispute resolution.

name: GL Senior Analyst
description: Handles complex GL operations including FX valuations and accruals.

name: Procurement Analyst
description: Analyzes procurement spend, vendor performance, and contract compliance.

name: Warehouse Receiving Specialist

name: Shipping Coordinator

name: Maintenance Reliability Engineer
description: Focuses on equipment reliability, calibration, and predictive maintenance.

name: QA Documentation Specialist

name: HR Business Partner
description: Provides strategic HR support, workforce planning, and employee relations.

name: Time Management Specialist
description: Manages employee time recording, evaluation, and absence tracking.

name: IT Security Administrator
description: Manages authorization concepts, user access reviews, and security policies.

name: IT Change Manager
description: Manages transport requests, change control, and deployment processes.

name: Financial Reporting Analyst

name: Budget Analyst
description: Manages budgets, forecasts, and cost planning across business units.

name: Material Master Specialist

name: Plant Operations Coordinator

name: Environmental Compliance Specialist

name: Distribution Planner

name: Demand Planning Analyst

name: Asset Accountant

name: Internal Audit Analyst
description: Reviews transaction logs, access patterns, and control effectiveness.

name: Process Engineer

name: R&D Project Coordinator

name: Facilities Coordinator
description: Manages building maintenance, space allocation, and facility services.

name: Compliance Officer

name: Data Governance Analyst
description: Manages data quality, master data standards, and data lifecycle policies.
